events.uses: PR lifecycle, head/base identity, changed-file routing, and exact veripsa-ack label transitions.
events.retained: Reduced identifiers, refs, labels, paths, processing state, and timestamps as documented in DATA_HANDLING.md.
events.transient: Original webhook body, PR/source/diff bodies, and fields outside the reduced routing surface.
Original webhook body and commit/file bodies.

events.uses: Rename, transfer, archive, and deletion lifecycle consistency.
events.transient: Original webhook body and unrelated repository fields.

events.uses: Observe other check completion and recover a missing fresh-head Veripsa check.
events.retained: Reduced check/head identifiers and processing outcome when needed operationally.
events.transient: Check output bodies and unrelated suite payload fields.

events.uses: Observe other check completion and the App's own requested-check lifecycle.
events.retained: Reduced check/head identifiers and processing outcome when needed operationally.
events.transient: Other providers' check output text and unrelated payload fields.

events.uses: Keep the in-flight view consistent with GitHub merge queues.
events.retained: Reduced merge-group, repository, ref, head, and processing metadata.
events.transient: Original webhook body and unrelated merge-group fields.

events.uses: Install, suspend, unsuspend, and uninstall lifecycle.
events.retained: Installation/account identifiers and lifecycle audit metadata.
events.transient: Original webhook body and unrelated account fields.

events.uses: Add or remove repositories from an installation.
events.retained: Installation/account/repository identifiers and lifecycle processing state.
events.transient: Original webhook body and unrelated repository fields.
